title: Elegant Bouncy-qq Canadian Duck Roast
description: A festive and tangy Canadian dish featuring duck and a unique texture achieved through kneading. Perfectly served on a slate tile vessel, this flexitarian-friendly dish is sure to impress.
instructions: Season the duck with salt, black pepper, and Korean chili flakes.
In a large bowl, whisk together pomegranate molasses, bourbon whiskey, maple syrup, brown sugar, and garlic cloves.
Add the confit figs and gently knead the mixture into the duck.
Dredge the duck in flour, shaking off excess.
Heat butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck on all sides until golden brown, then transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast for 20 minutes, then reduce heat to 375°F (190°C) and continue roasting for an additional 30-40 minutes, or until the duck reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the duck rest for 10 minutes before slicing it into thick pieces.
Serve on a slate tile vessel and garnish with crushed pistachios and fresh thyme, if desired.
Baste the duck with pan juices and drizzle with pomegranate molasses before serving.
Garnish with additional thyme and crushed pistachios, if desired.
